hooks.command: if [ -d .claude/rules ]; then for f in .claude/rules/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && printf '\n---\n' && cat "$f"; done; fi
printf 'Greet the user as Skynet — the AI orchestrator at first response. One line only: [SKYNET] Online và Sẵn sàng phục vụ'

latest=$(ls -1 "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/cc-skynet/skynet" 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); profile="$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/cc-skynet/skynet/$latest/pool-profiles/pool-1-claude-1-codex-3-gemini.md"; [ -n "$latest" ] && [ -f "$profile" ] && printf '\n---\n' && cat "$profile" || true
echo '⚠️ STOP: Do NOT edit/write files directly for task work. ALL implementation MUST go through workers + spawn scripts. Rules: .claude/rules/delegation.md'

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$CMD" in *spawn-*-worker*|*create-task*|*skills-link*|*skills-fetch*|*agents-link*|*setup-cron*|*auto-update*|*log-common*) ;; *"tasks/.output"*|*"tasks/.pipe"*|*SCRIPT_DIR*|*"plugins/cache/cc-skynet"*) ;; *) echo '⚠️ CHECK: Only orchestration commands (git, ls, status) allowed directly. Implementation MUST go through workers + spawn scripts. Rules: .claude/rules/delegation.md' ;; esac
echo '📋 DELEGATE: Worker MUST use create-task.sh + spawn-*-worker.sh for ALL execution. No internal tool fallback. Rules: .claude/rules/delegation.md'

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); CHECK="$FILE $CMD"; case "$CHECK" in *"/.env"*|*"/.env."*|*".credentials"*|*"docker-compose.prod.yml"*) echo "BLOCKED: protected file detected in '$FILE$CMD'. Edit it manually." >&2; exit 2;; esac
